Description.SourceString:
Avisk is a snake! I am not surprised by this discovery, he’s never been subtle about his ambition, but that he would dare to attempt an experiment on Viika, well that’s unforgivable.

He attached tubes, crystals and all sorts of nonsense to my sibling’s head and attempted something with rune essence that caused a lot of explosions. Viika was hurt, burned across their temple and one of their wings is damaged enough that they might never fly again.

I have never felt anger like I did in that moment. Even the rage from the curse never struck me as hard. In that instant I dragged blades of ice from the aether, and I would have torn Avisk to pieces of only my sibling hadn’t said “no”. Always too gentle Viika, not like the rest of us.

Maybe that’s why they never partook Rasthin’s discovery. Because they knew what monsters we’d become.

Avisk won’t get away without consequences. My sibling may be gentle, but I am not. I flow like the river and wield the patience of glaciers, and Avisk will learn that water always wins.

Maybe that’s why they never partook Rasthin’s discovery. Because they knew what monsters we’d become.
